scope.question: Run supervisor-review lanes for the D+Q bone headache adverse-event extraction candidate.

inputs.summary: Plan requested supervisor-review lanes for the D+Q headache adverse-event extraction candidate.
Reviewed candidate lifecycle, required review lanes, proposed headache result, and safety synthesis update.
Reviewed the structured headache adverse_event fields, source-located provenance, blank control-cell semantics, and descriptive effect boundary.
Reviewed safety synthesis compatibility, missing effect fields, and pooling_blocked rationale after the headache term-specific update.
Used the retained context pack to verify table row scope, source locators, target records, and source-artifact hashes.

outputs.summary: Completed extraction_fidelity, taxonomy_mapping, safety_limitations, and synthesis_boundary supervisor-review lanes for the D+Q bone headache adverse-event extraction candidate; set the candidate to in_review and linked the four accepting, non-blocking evidence reviews.

proposed_records.rationale: Moved the candidate to in_review and linked the four active supervisor-agent evidence review records.
Records the completed extraction-fidelity supervisor review for the headache adverse-event candidate.

quality_checks.summary: Verified extraction_fidelity, taxonomy_mapping, safety_limitations, and synthesis_boundary reviews are complete, accepting, non-blocking, and free of open major or critical findings.
npm run validate:records passed after adding the four review records and candidate linkage.

next_actions: Refresh generated control-plane state and run full repository verification.
Use the promotion command only if coordinator scope calls for accepting this candidate.
